name: kling_animate_image
description: Animate a still image with Kling image-to-video. CLOUD ONLY (run_cloud_workflow) — partner node, consumes Comfy Cloud credits (~EUR 1 per 5s std clip on v2-master). Upload the start frame with cloud_upload_input first.

image.description: Start-frame image name on the cloud (from cloud_upload_input).

prompt.description: Describe the motion you want, not the scene contents.

negative_prompt.default: blur, warping, morphing, distortion, extra limbs, text, watermark

filename_prefix.description: Output video name prefix (namespaced under claude/).

inputs.negative_prompt: blur, warping, morphing, distortion, extra limbs, text, watermark
